description_long: This is a modern, freestanding cabinet and shelf unit constructed primarily from light-colored wood with a natural grain finish. The structure features a tall, rectangular cabinet section with four upper doors and a lower open shelf area framed in black, providing both concealed and open storage. Extending perpendicularly from the lower section is a wide, flat shelf supported by slender black metal legs, creating a workspace or display surface. The design is minimalist, with clean lines and no visible handles, emphasizing a contemporary aesthetic. The black framing and metal legs contrast with the wood, adding visual interest and stability. This piece would be suitable for use in urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or communal spaces, offering both storage and functional surface area.
description: A modern, light wood cabinet and shelf unit with black metal accents, featuring both closed and open storage and a wide, flat workspace surface.
description_view_0: Side view showing the tall cabinet and the perpendicular shelf extending outward, supported by black metal legs.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the four upper cabinet doors, two open shelf compartments, and the full width of the attached shelf.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the length of the shelf and the solid wood side of the cabinet.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain, uninterrupted wood panel of the cabinet's back.
